mapper.insert:
insert into cost_result_trace ( trace_id, scene_id, version_id, rule_id, tier_id, variable_json, condition_json, pricing_json, timeline_json ) values
( #{item.traceId}, #{item.sceneId}, #{item.versionId}, #{item.ruleId}, #{item.tierId}, #{item.variableJson}, #{item.conditionJson}, #{item.pricingJson}, #{item.timelineJson} )
